creator: gebhart@secnetix.de
text:
The SVN mirror site svn0.eu.freebsd.org has both, IPv4 and IPv6 addresses but only listens on IPv4 on the https port. with IPv6 it runs into a timeout and no svn is possible. Unfortunately svn is too stupid to also try it with IPv4 after a failed IPv6 connection.
Please either fix it or remove the IPv6 address from DNS.
